links.tooltip: Return to main dashboard with map

targets.rawSql:
SELECT p.voltage as "Battery"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'battery'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT p.voltage as "Mains"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'mains'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT p.voltage as "DC/DC"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'dcdc'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT p.voltage as "DC/DC 24V"
FROM block_power_status p
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'dcdc24'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 1
SELECT CASE WHEN NOT COALESCE(is_online, false) THEN -1 ELSE COALESCE(temperature, -1) END AS "Temperature" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT CASE WHEN receiver_type NOT IN ('PolaRX5') THEN -2 WHEN NOT COALESCE(is_online, false) THEN -1 ELSE COALESCE(cpu_load, -1) END AS "CPU" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT CASE WHEN NOT COALESCE(is_online, false) THEN -1 ELSE COALESCE(disk_usage_pct, -1) END AS "Disk" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT CASE WHEN receiver_type = 'NetR5' THEN -2 WHEN NOT COALESCE(is_online, false) THEN -1 ELSE COALESCE(satellites_tracked, -1) END AS "Satellites" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT gps_sats AS "GPS", glonass_sats AS "GLO", galileo_sats AS "GAL", beidou_sats AS "BDS"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN overall_status = 'healthy' THEN 'All systems OK'
    WHEN COALESCE(status_details, '') = '' THEN 'Check file/port status'
    ELSE status_details
  END AS details,
  CASE overall_status
    WHEN 'healthy' THEN 'HEALTHY'
    WHEN 'warning' THEN 'WARNING'
    WHEN 'critical' THEN 'CRITICAL'
    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
  END AS label
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT uptime_seconds AS "Uptime" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
SELECT COALESCE(seconds_since_update, 0) AS "Checked" FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer, 0) AS "online"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station' AND d.connection_state = 'online'

SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer, 0) AS "degraded"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station' AND d.connection_state = 'degraded'

SELECT COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM d.state_duration)::integer, 0) AS "offline"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
WHERE d.station_id = '$station' AND d.connection_state = 'offline'

SELECT
  CASE WHEN ftp_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN ftp_open THEN 1
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%FTP refused%' THEN -2
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%FTP timeout%' THEN -3
    ELSE -4 END AS "FTP",
  CASE WHEN health_http_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN http_open THEN 1
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%HTTP refused%' THEN -2
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%HTTP timeout%' THEN -3
    ELSE -4 END AS "HTTP",
  CASE WHEN control_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN control_open THEN 1
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%CONTROL refused%' THEN -2
    WHEN status_details LIKE '%CONTROL timeout%' THEN -3
    ELSE -4 END AS "Ctrl"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr' AND status IN ('downloaded','archived')) THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + INTERVAL '1 day')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr'
          AND status IN ('downloaded','archived') ORDER BY file_date DESC LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "24h",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr' AND status IN ('downloaded','archived')) THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr'
          AND status IN ('downloaded','archived') ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "1Hz",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr' AND status IN ('downloaded','archived')) THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr'
          AND status IN ('downloaded','archived') ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "Status"

SELECT
  f.rinex_24h_status AS "15s",
  f.rinex_1hz_status AS "1Hz"
FROM station_data_flow_status f
WHERE f.sid = '$station'

SELECT
  CASE WHEN NOT COALESCE(d.is_online, false) THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_15s_24hr IS NULL THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_15s_24hr THEN 1
    ELSE -1
  END AS "15s",
  CASE WHEN NOT COALESCE(d.is_online, false) THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_1hz_1hr IS NULL THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_1hz_1hr THEN 1
    ELSE -1
  END AS "1Hz",
  CASE WHEN d.receiver_type != 'PolaRX5' THEN -2
    WHEN NOT COALESCE(d.is_online, false) THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_status_1hr IS NULL THEN -1
    WHEN l.session_status_1hr THEN 1
    ELSE -1
  END AS "Status"
FROM station_dashboard_data d
LEFT JOIN station_logging_status l ON l.sid = d.station_id
WHERE d.station_id = '$station'

SELECT CASE
  WHEN ntrip_status = 'connected' THEN 1
  WHEN ntrip_status IS NOT NULL THEN 0
  ELSE -1
END AS "RTK"
FROM station_dashboard_data
WHERE station_id = '$station'

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "Battery"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'battery'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "Mains"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'mains'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "DC/DC"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'dcdc'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "DC/DC 24V"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND '$power_type' = 'dcdc24'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  p.ts AS "Time",
  p.voltage AS "Voltage",
  r.temperature AS "Temperature",
  r.cpu_load AS "CPU",
  d.usage_percent AS "Disk",
  sat.total AS "Satellites",
  hs.overall_status AS "Status"
FROM block_power_status p
LEFT JOIN block_receiver_status r ON p.sid = r.sid AND p.ts = r.ts
LEFT JOIN block_disk_status d ON p.sid = d.sid AND p.ts = d.ts
LEFT JOIN block_satellite_tracking sat ON p.sid = sat.sid AND p.ts = sat.ts
LEFT JOIN block_health_summary hs ON p.sid = hs.sid AND p.ts = hs.ts
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
  AVG(avg_speed_bps) / 1024 AS "Speed (KB/s)"
FROM download_log
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND outcome = 'completed'
  AND avg_speed_bps IS NOT NULL
  AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', ts)
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS "Stalls"
FROM download_log
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND outcome = 'stall_timeout'
  AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY date_trunc('hour', ts)
ORDER BY time

SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_speed_bps) / 1024)::INTEGER AS "Avg Speed (KB/s)"
FROM download_log
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND outcome = 'completed'
  AND avg_speed_bps IS NOT NULL
  AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()

SELECT total AS "Satellites"
FROM block_satellite_tracking
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(s.stall_timeout_override, 0) AS "Timeout Override (s)"
FROM stations s
WHERE s.sid = '$station'

SELECT
  'Receiver:' AS "c1",
  'SN:'        AS "c2",
  'Fw:'        AS "c3",
  NULL         AS "ip_url",
  NULL         AS "maps_url",
  0            AS "ord"
UNION ALL
SELECT
  CASE WHEN s.receiver_type IS NULL THEN '⚠'||COALESCE(s.detected_model,'—') WHEN LOWER(s.receiver_type)!=LOWER(COALESCE(s.detected_model,'')) THEN '✗'||COALESCE(s.detected_model,'—') ELSE COALESCE(s.detected_model,'—') END,
  CASE WHEN s.configured_serial IS NULL THEN '⚠'||COALESCE(s.serial_number,'—') WHEN s.configured_serial!=COALESCE(s.serial_number,'') THEN '✗'||COALESCE(s.serial_number,'—') ELSE COALESCE(s.serial_number,'—') END,
  CASE WHEN s.configured_firmware IS NULL THEN '⚠'||COALESCE(s.firmware_version,'—') WHEN normalize_firmware_version(s.configured_firmware::text)!=normalize_firmware_version(COALESCE(s.firmware_version,'')::text) THEN '✗'||COALESCE(s.firmware_version,'—') ELSE COALESCE(s.firmware_version,'—') END,
  NULL,
  NULL,
  1
FROM stations s WHERE s.sid = '$station'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  CASE WHEN d.ip_address IS NOT NULL
       THEN host(d.ip_address)||':'||COALESCE(d.station_http_port,80)::text
       ELSE '—' END,
  CASE WHEN d.latitude IS NOT NULL
       THEN ROUND(d.latitude::numeric,4)::text||', '||ROUND(d.longitude::numeric,4)::text
       ELSE 'No coordinates' END,
  NULL,
  CASE WHEN d.ip_address IS NOT NULL
       THEN 'http://'||host(d.ip_address)||':'||COALESCE(d.station_http_port,80)::text
       ELSE NULL END,
  CASE WHEN d.latitude IS NOT NULL
       THEN 'https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query='
         ||ROUND(d.latitude::numeric,4)::text||','||ROUND(d.longitude::numeric,4)::text
       ELSE NULL END,
  2
FROM station_dashboard_data d WHERE d.station_id = '$station'
ORDER BY ord

list.definition: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text
list.label: Area
list.name: area
list.query: SELECT 'all' AS __value, 'All Stations' AS __text UNION ALL SELECT area_id AS __value, area_name || ' (' || area_type || ')' AS __text FROM station_areas ORDER BY __text

list.definition: SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid
list.label: Station
list.name: station
list.query: SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(station_name, sid) FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'
list.label: Station Name
list.name: station_name
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(station_name, sid) FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(power_type, 'battery') FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'
list.label: Power Type
list.name: power_type
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(power_type, 'battery') FROM stations WHERE sid = '$station'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(ftp_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
list.label: FTP Port
list.name: ftp_port
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(ftp_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(health_http_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
list.label: HTTP Port
list.name: http_port
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(health_http_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'

list.definition: SELECT COALESCE(control_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
list.label: Ctrl Port
list.name: ctrl_port
list.query: SELECT COALESCE(control_port::text, '') FROM station_dashboard_data WHERE station_id = '$station'
